validation.urlProtocol: URL must start with http:// or https://

dashboard.specimenCaption: Exactly what your Discord profile shows.
dashboard.idleSub: Play something in Plexamp or any Plex player and it appears here — and on Discord — within ~{seconds}s.

specimen.caption: Exactly what your Discord profile shows.

connectionStore.reconnectFailedSuggestion: Check your Plex server and user settings, then try again.
connectionStore.errorSuggestion: Please check your connection and try again.

wizard.skipFailedDetail: Failed to skip setup. Please try again.

welcome.title: Relay your Plex music to Discord.
welcome.lede: PlexCord shows what you're listening to on Plex as a Discord Rich Presence status — complete with album art, track info, and live progress. Setup takes about two minutes.
welcome.needPlexCaption: With access to a Plex Media Server that has music libraries.
welcome.needDiscordCaption: The Discord desktop app must be open on this computer.

plex.title: Connect to your Plex account
plex.lede: Sign in with a secure PIN code, then pick the server PlexCord should watch.
plex.noServersFound: No Plex servers found on your local network. Make sure your server is running, or enter its address manually below.
plex.validFormat: Valid format — press Enter to test the connection
plex.portHint: The default Plex port is 32400. Use https for remote connections.
plex.unreachableSuggestion: Check that your Plex server is running and reachable from this computer.
plex.errPinStatus: Failed to check PIN status. Please try again.
plex.errConnect: Failed to connect to Plex server
plex.errDiscovery: Discovery failed. Try again, or enter your server address manually.

user.title: Select a user
user.lede: Choose which Plex user account to monitor for playback activity.
user.errNoServer: No server URL configured. Please go back and select a server.
user.errLoad: Failed to load users from Plex server
user.noUsersText: No user accounts were found on this Plex server. This may happen if the server is configured for admin-only access.
user.onlyOneUser: Only one user on this server

discord.title: Connect to Discord
discord.lede: PlexCord will show your Plex music activity on your Discord profile using Rich Presence.
discord.mustBeRunning: Discord must be running on this computer.
discord.connectedCaption: Your profile will update when you play music on Plex.
discord.errNotRunning: Discord is not running. Start Discord, then try again.
discord.errInvalidClientId: Invalid Discord Client ID. Check your configuration below.
discord.customClientIdCaption: Use your own Discord application for custom branding or testing. Leave empty to use the default PlexCord application.
discord.howToCreate: How to create a Discord application
discord.stepNewApp: Click "New Application" and give it a name
discord.stepCopyId: Copy the "Application ID" from the General Information page
discord.stepPaste: Paste it in the field above
discord.stepUpload: (Optional) Upload custom images under Rich Presence Art Assets
discord.customNote: Custom applications require additional setup. Most users should use the default PlexCord application.

complete.title: Setup complete.
complete.lede: PlexCord is ready to relay your Plex music activity to Discord.
complete.errSuggestion: Fix the issue, then press Finish setup again.
complete.discordSkipped: Discord not connected — presence won't publish until you connect it in Settings.
complete.idleTitle: Play something on Plex to see it live
complete.next1: Your Discord status updates automatically when you play music on Plex
complete.next2: PlexCord runs in the background and minimizes to the system tray
complete.next3: You can change settings anytime from the dashboard

settings.title: Settings
settings.noServers: No servers configured — add one to start relaying presence.
settings.pollingCaption: How often PlexCord checks Plex for playback changes · Applies on next poll cycle
settings.tokenCaption: Tokens fill in from the playing track. Click one to insert it at the cursor; empty fields use the default format.
settings.hideWhenPausedCaption: Clear Discord presence while playback is paused
settings.startOnLoginCaption: Launch PlexCord automatically when you log in
settings.minimizeToTrayCaption: Keep running in the system tray when the window is closed
settings.autoUpdateCheckCaption: Check every 6 hours and download updates in the background
settings.autoUpdateCheckCaptionNotify: Check every 6 hours and notify when a new version is out
settings.languageCaption: Choose the language PlexCord is displayed in
settings.warnReconnect: Saved, but Discord did not reconnect — is Discord running?
settings.sendTestCaption: Pushes a sample activity to your Discord profile
settings.updateInstalled: Update installed. Restart PlexCord to finish updating to {version}.
settings.resetCaption: Clears all settings and returns to the setup wizard
settings.searching: Searching for Plex servers on your network…
settings.discoveryFailed: Discovery failed. Make sure your Plex server is on the same network, or enter the URL manually.
settings.noServersFound: No servers found — enter the server details manually below.
settings.urlHelp: The default Plex port is 32400 · use https for remote servers
settings.gateCaption: Enter a name and a valid URL to add

toast.loadFailedDetail: Could not read settings from the backend.
toast.pollingFailedDetail: The polling interval could not be saved.
toast.loadServersFailedDetail: Could not read the server list.
toast.updateServerFailedDetail: The server state could not be changed.
toast.removeServerFailedDetail: The server could not be removed.
toast.addServerFailedDetail: The server could not be added.
toast.formatFailedDetail: The presence format could not be saved.
toast.hidePausedFailedDetail: The setting could not be saved.
toast.delayFailedDetail: The delay could not be saved.
toast.autoStartFailed: Failed to save start on login
toast.settingFailedDetail: The setting could not be saved.
toast.trayFailed: Failed to save minimize to tray
toast.updateCheckFailedDetail: Could not reach the release server.
toast.updateFailedDetail: The update could not be installed.
toast.restartFailedDetail: PlexCord could not restart itself — please restart it manually.
toast.resetFailedDetail: The application could not be reset.
toast.resetCompleteDetail: PlexCord has been reset — returning to setup.
toast.autoUpdateFailedDetail: The setting could not be saved.

confirm.removeOnlyActive: Remove {name}? This is your only active server — PlexCord will stop publishing presence.
confirm.removeMessage: Remove {name}? PlexCord will stop publishing presence from this server.
confirm.resetMessage: This removes your Plex token and server configuration, your Discord settings, and all preferences. This cannot be undone.
